title: Tooltip Tweaks
description: Modest expansion to tooltips, including additional information for tools, food, and other items.
body:
🔹 Requires Fabric API and YetAnotherConfigLib🔹

🏙️ Join the Penumbra Discord server for development updates! 🏙️

## **Tooltip Tweaks** is a modest expansion to tooltips, adding new information for various items including durability, food nutrition, while also improving the layout and readability. The default settings are configured to appeal to most users, but the mod offers different options and more functionality beyond that!
Full Feature List
  • Durability display (with modifiable text color and digit count)
  • Display item uses left when durability is 25% or lower
  • Display item repair cost on relevant menus or at all times
  • Update crossbow tooltip colors
  • Update enchantment layout
  • Update tipped arrow tooltips
  • Display time under clock
  • Display day number under clock
  • Display year number under clock (each 365 in-game days)
  • Display moon phase under clock
  • Display compass location coordinates
  • Display compass location distance
  • Display compass location dimension
  • Hide compass info unless shifting
  • Display container contents as per-item, per-stack, or inventory
  • Configure container list maximum length
  • Display maps
  • Display axolotl variants
  • Display note block instrument type
  • Display paintings
  • Display food nourishment as text or icons
  • Display food icons underneath or beside item text
  • Display food saturation
  • Display food status effects
  • Display suspicious stew status effects
  • Display food modifiers
  • Display special effects (for milk bucket, honey bottle)
  • Update potion tooltips
